global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body, predominantly black plumage, and a distinctive red face. It has a long, slender neck and a sharp, hooked bill. The feathers are glossy and the wings are long and narrow.

part_details.face: Bright red skin around the eyes and beak, contrasting with dark feathers.
part_details.plumage: Glossy black feathers covering the body, providing a sleek appearance.
part_details.neck: Long and slender, covered in black feathers.
part_details.bill: Sharp and hooked, dark in color, suited for catching fish.
part_details.wings: Long and narrow, enabling efficient flight over water.

spatial_relations: The red face is positioned at the front of the head.
The long neck extends from the body to the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
